description: One Terraform file exercising every scan_iac terraform rule exactly once: a literal access_key (tf-no-hardcoded-creds), insecure=true (tf-no-skip-tls), a 0.0.0.0/0 ingress (tf-security-group-no-world-admin), an IAM Action="*" wildcard (tf-iam-no-wildcard), publicly_accessible=true (tf-rds-not-public), and storage_encrypted=false (tf-storage-encrypted).
